hudOpacity.name: HUD Opacity
hudOpacity.hint: Controls the transparency of the Action Display HUD overlay.

hudScale.name: HUD Scale
hudScale.hint: Controls the proportional size of the Action Display HUD (icons, text, tabs, etc.).

logVerbosity.name: Log Verbosity Level
logVerbosity.hint: Controls the level of detail printed to the browser console.

persistDetached.name: Persist Detached HUD on Click-Off
persistDetached.hint: If enabled, a detached HUD will stay open when clicking off the token, and will only close if you right-click the same token again.

filterNoResources.name: Filter Depleted Actions
filterNoResources.hint: If enabled, actions with no remaining resources (charges, slots, etc.) will be hidden from the HUD.
